prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-AOSSCCC47OZ-47OZ-CHRM Product Type: DRINKING_CUP Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Stainless Steel Collapsible Camping Cup 4.7oz Description: Stay hydrated on the go with the ASR Outdoor Collapsible Camping Cup.

This cup will hold up to 4.7oz, and is constructed of durable stainless steel. It comes with a key chain and key ring so you can easily attach it to your backpack, daypack or belt when not in use. Simple to use, just flick your wrist and the cup will extend to it's full height. Make sure to grab one of these before your next camping trip. Search Terms: outdoor camping accessories best 2021 folding compact pocket cup heat resiliant stove travel outside wilderness cooking Features: - ASR Outdoor Collapsible Cup - 4.7oz Capacity - Material: Stainless Steel - Comes w/ Key Chain & Key Ring - Easily Attach to Backpack, Purse or Belt - Extends and Collapses w/ Ease === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 4.7oz Stainless Steel Collapsible Camping Cup

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 4.7oz Chrome Stainless Steel Collapsible Camping Cup

anthropic.title_differentiation: Compact Folding Design, Stainless Steel, Keychain Attachment, Extends With Wrist Flick, Portable Travel Cup

openai.title_differentiation: Key Chain And Key Ring, Compact Pocket Size, Durable Stainless Steel, Easy Extend And Collapse, Backpack Attachment
